About Shaebha Life Care

Committed to Healing Through Science

Shaebha Life Care is a pioneering pharmaceutical company dedicated to improving lives through the development, manufacturing, and distribution of high-quality, affordable medicines. With over two decades of expertise, we blend scientific rigour with compassionate care to serve patients and healthcare professionals across the globe.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, certified by international regulatory bodies, ensure that every product leaving our doors meets the most stringent safety and efficacy standards.

Our Pharmaceutical Portfolio

Medicines That Make a Difference

Trusted formulations across therapeutic categories, developed with cutting-edge science and patient wellbeing at the forefront.

CardioShield Pro
A next-generation antihypertensive tablet combining two active agents for superior blood pressure control with minimal side effects. Suitable for long-term cardiac management.
Cardiovascular
BronchoClear Inhaler
A precision-dose inhaler formulated for asthma and COPD management. Provides rapid bronchodilation and long-lasting airway relief with every dose.
Respiratory
GlucoBalance XR
Extended-release metformin combination for type-2 diabetes management. Optimises glucose control over 24 hours while reducing gastrointestinal side effects.
Diabetes Care
NeuroCalm SR
Sustained-release formulation for anxiety and depressive disorders. Clinically validated to improve mood stability with a favourable tolerability profile.
Neuroscience
ArthroRelief Gel
Topical NSAID formulation providing targeted anti-inflammatory relief for musculoskeletal pain, arthritis, and sports injuries without systemic burden.
Musculoskeletal
ImmunBoost Syrup
A fortified multivitamin and mineral syrup enriched with zinc and vitamin C. Designed for children and adults to strengthen immune response year-round.
Immunity
AntiBact 500
Broad-spectrum antibiotic tablets effective against a wide range of bacterial infections. Available in multiple strengths for adult and paediatric use.
Anti-Infective
OsteoStrong D3
A calcium and vitamin D3 combination supplement formulated to support bone density, prevent osteoporosis, and promote musculoskeletal health.
Bone Health
GastroEase Pro
Proton pump inhibitor capsules providing sustained relief from acid reflux, peptic ulcers, and GERD. Fast-acting enteric-coated formula.
Gastroenterology
FeverDown Paediatric
Safe and effective paracetamol suspension for infants and children. Precisely dosed with flavoured formula to ease administration and reduce fever fast.
Paediatrics
Why Choose Us

Our Commitment to You

R&D Excellence

Our dedicated research teams continuously develop innovative formulations to address evolving patient needs.

Strict Quality Control

Every product undergoes multi-stage testing. We exceed regulatory requirements at every stage of manufacturing.

Reliable Supply Chain

We ensure timely delivery of medicines to hospitals, pharmacies, and distributors without disruption.

Patient-First Values

Every decision we make is guided by one principle — improving the quality of life for patients everywhere.
